opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands are cramping so intensely they are locked in a claw shape, I cannot stop vomiting, and I haven't passed any urine since this morning.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I started chemo for my lymphoma three days ago and now I feel horrendous — the cramps in my hands are agonising, I keep vomiting, and I've stopped weeing. I'm on my own and can barely hold the phone.

symptom_narrative.onset: started feeling wiped out and awful about two days after my first chemo; the cramps, vomiting and not passing urine all came on today
symptom_narrative.duration: the fatigue for about 48 hours, the cramps and vomiting for the last few hours, no urine for about 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: my hands have seized into a claw and I can't uncurl my fingers, I keep vomiting forcefully, and there's a dull ache in both sides of my back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I have ever felt — the hand cramps are unbearable and I feel muddled and exhausted
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both hands, my stomach from all the vomiting, and a dull ache in both sides of my lower back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse through the day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps building on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling very drained, a bit confused about the timeline, and thirsty but I can't keep water down
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, I can't stand, and I can't grip anything because my hands are locked up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a large lymphoma (cancer of the lymph glands) that I've just started chemotherapy for
past_medical_history.how_managed: began induction chemotherapy three days ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a tablet to protect my kidneys during chemo (allopurinol)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; is finding it very hard to hold the phone or drink water because both hands are cramped

objective_data_offered.value: I haven't passed any urine at all since this morning — about 12 hours
Both my hands are cramped into a claw and I can't straighten my fingers
I keep vomiting and can't keep any fluid or my tablets down
